originalTitle: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Is Up 28.5% After AI Switch Launch And S&P 500 Entry - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In early June 2026, Marvell Technology launched the Teralynx T100, a 102.4 Tbps AI-optimized switch built on 3nm technology, while also securing upcoming inclusion in the S&P 500 after meeting the index’s cumulative profitability requirements. content:
In early June 2026, Marvell Technology launched the Teralynx T100, a 102.4 Tbps AI-optimized switch built on 3nm technology, while also securing upcoming inclusion in the S&P 500 after meeting the index’s cumulative profitability requirements.

These milestones coincide with Marvell’s deepening AI data center role, highlighted by a multi-billion-dollar Nvidia investment and closer collaboration on custom chips and high-speed interconnects.

We’ll now examine how Marvell’s AI-focused Teralynx T100 launch and S&P 500 inclusion reshape its investment narrative and future assumptions.

Find 49 companies with promising cash flow potential yet trading below their fair value .

Marvell Technology Investment Narrative Recap

To own Marvell today, you have to believe its AI data center focus will keep translating into meaningful, profitable demand, despite reliance on a few huge hyperscaler programs. The Teralynx T100 and S&P 500 inclusion reinforce that AI networking is the core near term catalyst, while the biggest risk remains concentration in large, lumpy custom and interconnect projects that could swing sharply if hyperscalers change course. So far, this news strengthens rather than changes that equation.

The most relevant recent announcement to this story is Marvell’s sharply higher guidance on May 27, where it outlined fiscal 2027 revenue near US$11.5 billion and fiscal 2028 near US$16.5 billion, driven largely by data center and interconnect. That outlook is exactly what the Teralynx T100 is designed to support: denser, lower power AI clusters that deepen Marvell’s role with hyperscalers, but also tighten the link between a few major AI build outs and the company’s financial outcomes.

Yet behind the excitement around Teralynx T100, investors should also be aware of how dependent those targets are on a small number of hyperscale customers...

Read the full narrative on Marvell Technology (it's free!)

Marvell Technology's narrative projects $12.1 billion revenue and $2.9 billion earnings by 2028.

Uncover how Marvell Technology's forecasts yield a $118.93 fair value , a 55% downside to its current price.

Before this Teralynx T100 news, the most pessimistic analysts already worried that Marvell’s 74% data center exposure could bite, even while still assuming revenue might reach about US$18.5 billion by 2029, so you should recognize how far opinions can differ and consider how fresh AI wins or setbacks might shift those expectations from here.

chineseTitle: Marvell Technology (MRVL) 在 AI Switch 推出和进入标准普尔 500 指数后上涨 28.5% - 牛市情况发生变化了吗？
chineseSummary: 2026 年 6 月上旬，Marvell Technology 推出了 Teralynx T100，这是一款基于 3nm 技术构建的 102.4 Tbps AI 优化交换机，同时在满足该指数的累积盈利能力要求后，也确保即将纳入标准普尔 500 指数。这些里程碑与 Marvell 不断深化的 AI 数据中心角色相吻合，Nvidia 数十亿美元的投资以及在定制芯片和高速互连方面的更密切合作凸显了 Marvell 的人工智能数据中心角色。我们现在将研究 Marvell 专注于 AI 的 Teralynx 如何...
chineseContent:
2026 年 6 月上旬，Marvell Technology 推出了 Teralynx T100，这是一款基于 3nm 技术构建的 102.4 Tbps AI 优化交换机，同时在满足该指数的累积盈利能力要求后，也确保即将纳入标准普尔 500 指数。

这些里程碑与 Marvell 不断深化的 AI 数据中心角色相吻合，Nvidia 数十亿美元的投资以及在定制芯片和高速互连方面的更密切合作凸显了 Marvell 的人工智能数据中心角色。

现在，我们将研究 Marvell 推出的专注于 AI 的 Teralynx T100 以及纳入标准普尔 500 指数如何重塑其投资叙述和未来假设。

查找 49 家具有良好现金流潜力但交易价格低于公允价值的公司。

Marvell 技术投资叙述回顾

如今，要拥有 Marvell，您必须相信其人工智能数据中心重点将继续转化为有意义的、有利可图的需求，尽管依赖一些大型超大规模项目。 Teralynx T100 和标准普尔 500 指数的纳入强化了人工智能网络是近期核心催化剂的事实，而最大的风险仍然集中在大型、块状的定制和互连项目上，如果超大规模企业改变方向，这些项目可能会急剧波动。到目前为止，这一消息加强了而不是改变了这一方程式。

最近与此故事最相关的公告是 Marvell 5 月 27 日大幅提高的指引，其中概述了 2027 财年收入接近 115 亿美元，2028 财年收入接近 165 亿美元，主要由数据中心和互连推动。这种前景正是 Teralynx T100 旨在支持的目标：更密集、更低功耗的 AI 集群，可以深化 Marvell 在超大规模领域的角色，同时也加强了一些主要 AI 构建与公司财务业绩之间的联系。

然而，在 Teralynx T100 令人兴奋的背后，投资者还应该意识到这些目标对少数超大规模客户的依赖程度......

Read the full narrative on Marvell Technology (it's free!)

Marvell Technology's narrative projects $12.1 billion revenue and $2.9 billion earnings by 2028.

Uncover how Marvell Technology's forecasts yield a $118.93 fair value , a 55% downside to its current price.

在 Teralynx T100 消息发布之前，最悲观的分析师已经担心 Marvell 74% 的数据中心风险可能会受到影响，尽管仍然假设到 2029 年收入可能达到约 185 亿美元，因此您应该认识到意见可能存在多大差异，并考虑新的人工智能胜利或挫折可能会如何改变这些预期。

市场不会等待。这些快速移动的股票现在很热门。在运行之前获取列表：

人工智能即将改变医疗保健。这 39 只股票致力于从早期诊断到药物发现等各个领域。最棒的是——它们的市值都低于 10 亿美元——还有时间尽早入场。

如今最好的人工智能股票可能不只是英伟达和微软这样的巨头。通过这 13 家专注于人工智能的小型公司，通过机器学习、自动化和数据智能方面的早期创新，实现强劲的增长潜力，为您的退休生活提供资金，寻找下一个重大机遇。
